sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3683" key="a)kroxhni/skoi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρο-χηνίσκοι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n3683.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">extremities of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζεῦγλαι</foreign> in chariot, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:146" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.146</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
